groups.title: Essentials
groups.description: Minimum inputs for a LinkedIn-ready draft.

groups.title: Account & publishing
groups.description: Profile or Page, features, and brand context.

groups.title: Post information
groups.description: Type, message, length, tone, and schedule context.

groups.title: Publishing context
groups.description: Who speaks for whom — personal vs company authorization.

groups.title: Audience
groups.description: Professional readers — not every visitor is a buyer.

groups.title: Objectives
groups.description: One dominant goal per post.

groups.title: Facts & claims
groups.description: Only supplied, verified claims.

groups.title: Author
groups.description: Real role and experience only — never invent credentials.

groups.title: Personal experience
groups.description: Approved stories only — no fake vulnerability.

groups.title: Organization
groups.description: Approved company facts only.

groups.title: Product / service
groups.description: Current stage and real availability — no vaporware.

groups.title: Offer & commercial
groups.description: Prices, codes, and terms only if confirmed.

groups.title: Event
groups.description: Absolute dates, time zone, and real event details.

groups.title: Customer story & case study
groups.description: Permissioned quotes and measured results only.

groups.title: Partnership
groups.description: Disclosures and partner approval.

groups.title: Funding & transactions
groups.description: Public, approved financial facts only.

groups.title: Research & data
groups.description: Sourced research with methodology limits.

groups.title: Job & hiring
groups.description: Open roles with real requirements and process.

groups.title: Employer brand
groups.description: Culture and workplace claims you can stand behind.

groups.title: Employee advocacy
groups.description: Employee-shared posts — clear personal vs official.

groups.title: Article / newsletter / long-form
groups.description: Article and newsletter context when used.

groups.title: Links
groups.description: Destination URLs and preview notes.

groups.title: Call to action
groups.description: One clear professional next step.

groups.title: Engagement prompt
groups.description: Real questions — no engagement bait.

groups.title: Post format
groups.description: Text, image, document, video, poll — verify limits in app.

groups.title: Video script
groups.description: Native video details when video is the format.

groups.title: Poll
groups.description: Neutral options — not for impression gaming.

groups.title: Corrections
groups.description: What is wrong and what is correct.

groups.title: Media assets
groups.description: Images, charts, rights, and alt text.

groups.title: User-generated content
groups.description: Permissioned UGC only.

groups.title: AI / synthetic media
groups.description: Disclose when synthetic media is used.

groups.title: Mentions & tagging
groups.description: Only tag people and Pages with permission.

groups.title: Hashtags
groups.description: Relevant professional tags — no stuffing.

groups.title: Emojis
groups.description: Use sparingly and on-brand.

groups.title: Commercial disclosure
groups.description: Partnership, affiliate, and paid relationship wording.

groups.title: Employment & insider info
groups.description: Confidential and MNPI boundaries.

groups.title: High-stakes & regulated
groups.description: Extra care for legal, financial, medical claims.

groups.title: Political / civic
groups.description: Only when intentional and reviewed.

groups.title: Community management
groups.description: Comment ownership and moderation.

groups.title: Direct messages
groups.description: DM ownership and sensitive-data limits.

groups.title: Timing & scheduling
groups.description: When to publish and why.

groups.title: Post frequency
groups.description: Cadence context for this account.

groups.title: Cross-platform
groups.description: Do not paste generic multi-platform copy.

groups.title: Paid promotion
groups.description: Keep organic copy honest when ads are separate.

groups.title: A/B testing
groups.description: One variable at a time if testing.

groups.title: Metrics
groups.description: How success will be measured.

groups.title: Freshness & currency
groups.description: Dates and what may go stale.

variables.label: Topic
variables.placeholder: How small teams ship useful content with templates
variables.hint: What the post is about — specific to LinkedIn.

help.what: Post topic.
help.why: Keeps the LinkedIn post focused on one professional idea.
help.example: Why we publish Early Access status without fake social proof
help.avoid: Generic multi-platform blurbs or several unrelated topics.

variables.label: Post Type
variables.hint: Pick one confirmed type — do not switch just to sell harder.

help.what: Confirmed LinkedIn post type.
help.why: Structure, tone, and CTA depend on type.
help.example: thought-leadership post
help.avoid: Turning every post into a lead-generation post without basis.

variables.label: Audience
variables.placeholder: operators and marketers who publish professional content
variables.hint: Primary LinkedIn audience for this post.

help.what: Primary professional audience.
help.why: Shapes language, depth, and CTA relevance.
help.example: Founders and content leads at early-stage B2B products
help.avoid: Assuming every reader is a buyer, executive, or hiring manager.

variables.label: Tone
variables.hint: How the post should sound on LinkedIn.

help.what: Tone — a parameter from the LinkedIn Post brief (Post information).
help.why: When provided, the model uses this instead of inventing facts, stories, credentials, or engagement tricks. Empty fields stay unset ([tone]).
help.example: clear, credible, conversational professional
help.avoid: Invented social proof, fake vulnerability, unverified claims, or private details for tone.
